summary: A lightweight debug task using synthetic regression data with a simple MLP model. The experiment generates 1000 samples with 20 features using sklearn's make_regression, trains a 2-layer MLP (64->32 hidden units) with ReLU activation for 100 epochs, and evaluates using MSE, R2, and MAE metrics. Training completes in approximately 5 seconds on GPU.

key_files.description: Main experiment script containing SimpleMLP model definition, data generation, training loop, and evaluation functions. Entry point is main() which runs the baseline experiment and saves results to final_info.json.
